raw_output_payload.reasoning: We need to display binary dump as floating point double values. Use od -An -t f8? Actually od -An -t f8 will output double. But need to read file. So command: od -An -t f8 /workspace/dir1/long.txt. Or use hexdump -C? But requirement: floating point values of double size. So od -An -t f8. Maybe also -v to show all. So final.
